# API & CLI Reference

## CLI Quick Reference

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `<cmd>` | description |

### Common Workflows

```bash
# workflow example
```

## HTTP API Reference

Base URL: `https://<host>:<port>/v1`

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `POST` | `/path` | description |

### Example Request

```bash
curl -s \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://host:port/v1/path
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "key": "value"
}
```
